title: cynanchum leucophellum
intro: Cynanchum leucophellum, also known as the White Ghost Vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral activities. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the root of Cynanchum leucophellum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
